# Oregon Executive-Branch Knowledge Repository (DAS pilot)

> Curated, NON-AUTHORITATIVE copies and summaries of the statutes, administrative rules,
> executive orders, policies, and standards governing Oregon executive-branch agencies,
> starting with the Department of Administrative Services (DAS). Every document carries
> provenance frontmatter and links to its official source — always verify there. Agent
> rules live in AGENTS.md.

## Statutes (ORS)

- [Statutes index](statutes/_index.md): Oregon Revised Statutes relevant to DAS and
  statewide IT/administration (ORS 183, 184, 192, 276A, 291/293). Consult for the legal
  authority behind any rule or policy.

## Administrative Rules (OAR)

- [Rules index](rules/_index.md): Oregon Administrative Rules; chapter 125 is DAS
  (Division 800 = State Information Security). Consult for regulations with the force of
  law implementing the statutes.

## Executive Orders

- [Executive orders index](executive-orders/_index.md): Governor's executive orders
  affecting executive-branch administration.

## DAS Policies

- [DAS policies index](agencies/das/policies/_index.md): DAS statewide policies (107-xxx
  series and others) binding executive-branch agencies. Consult for operational
  requirements below the level of law.
- [DAS 107-004-052 — Cyber and Information Security](agencies/das/policies/das-107-004-052.md):
  the statewide cyber/information security program policy; consult for agency security
  program requirements, roles (State CISO, agency heads, users), the enterprise security
  baseline, and the offshoring prohibition.

## DAS Accounting Manual

- [OAM index](agencies/das/accounting-manual/_index.md): Oregon Accounting Manual —
  statewide financial policy from the Office of the State Controller.

## DAS Standards (EIS/CSS)

- [Standards index](agencies/das/standards/_index.md): statewide information security
  standards maintained by Enterprise Information Services / Cyber Security Services under
  ORS 276A.300 — the non-policy documents that policies require agencies to uphold.

## External References

- [External references index](external-references/_index.md): summaries + links for
  non-Oregon documents referenced by policy (e.g., NIST SP 800-53). Third-party
  copyrighted standards are summarized only, never reproduced.
